results.title: Fifa chief defends World Cup ‘hydration breaks’
results.description: Fifa president Gianni ⁠Infantino has ⁠defended the introduction of ​hydration breaks at the World Cup, insisting that for football’s governing body they are ​driven purely by sporting considerations and ‌not commercial interests.

results.title: Beiranvand's seven saves help Iran battle to 0-0 draw with 10-man Belgium
results.description: Alireza Beiranvand delivered another outstanding World Cup performance on Sunday, making seven saves to help Iran battle to a 0-0 draw against Belgium in Group G in Los Angeles.

results.title: Gill climbs to No.2 in ODI rankings; Henry draws level with Bumrah atop Test bowling charts
results.description: Dubai, June 24 (IANS) India opener Shubman Gill climbed to second place in the latest ICC ODI Batter rankings, while New Zealand pacer Matt Henry joined India’s Jasprit Bumrah at...

results.title: University objects to railway line over observatory
results.description: Research at the Mullard Radio Astronomy Observatory has been recognised with two Nobel Prizes.
